untranslatable_reason: The signal requires ranking stocks by 3-12 month relative returns (winners vs losers) and relative positioning within a universe. The ALLOWED INDICATORS list only contains 'returns' (current bar returns), not a lookback period return comparison metric or rank-based selection. A proper implementation requires: (1) calculation of cumulative returns over 3-12 month lookback windows, (2) cross-sectional ranking/percentile logic, and (3) universe-relative positioning. These portfolio-level operations are not expressible with single-indicator point-in-time conditions.
translation_notes: Momentum strategy requiring relative performance ranking across multiple lookback periods cannot be fully translated into point-in-time indicator conditions. The 'returns' indicator provided measures single-bar returns, not the 3-12 month formation period returns needed for winners/losers classification. Implementation would require custom ranking logic external to the JSON rule engine.
